limitations.detail: Trusted spread coverage is 0/240. Provider selection is deferred until the operator identifies the intended execution venue.
The campaign retains 720 proxy feature observations; proxy evidence remains explicitly quality-capped.
The required feature/time-aware temporal baseline is not globally warm.

additional_data_most_needed: observed bid-ask spread and order-book execution-quality snapshots
intraday bars and exact decision-to-review latency
direct catalyst, calendar, derivatives, and on-chain evidence with point-in-time lineage
more independent matured episodes across routes, regimes, and data-quality cohorts
conclusions.confirmation_verification_scope: canonical persisted scenario reduction is exact-equal; compact reports do not reconstruct stripped raw threshold contexts or re-evaluate Decision v2

conclusions.next_human_boundary: review sealed confirmation with sample size, regime coverage, data quality, cost survivability, and operator burden before any explicit policy decision

validated.claim: historical replay, episode accounting, controls, walk-forward, and sealed final-test mechanics executed under immutable bindings
validated.uncertainty: route samples are uneven and are not causal evidence

what_is_not_validated: intraday timing, observed spread, order-book execution, slippage, or adverse selection
any route or origin with no matured empirical episode
automatic production threshold, route, or policy changes
what_is_validated: immutable historical replay and episode accounting completed for the reported partitions
closed route and origin cohort accounting reconciles to persisted canonical ideas and episodes
the recommendation seal and final confirmation are bound to the frozen protocol and exact selected-day denominators

categories.selection_rule: matured episode within two score points of a frozen production route threshold
representative episode pair from an aggregate adjacent score-bucket violation
matured episode at or above the production actionable threshold with non-positive directional return
matured episode below the production dashboard threshold with positive directional return
matured catalyst-unknown episode with positive directional return
matured catalyst-confirmed episode with non-positive directional return
predeclared missed-move evaluator row that qualifies as a missed opportunity
endpoint-threshold economic move excluded by predeclared research, tradability, visibility, or outcome-contract requirements
explicit manipulation warning, or low-liquidity high-chase false-positive pattern; concern candidate only
frozen false-positive/late analysis classified the episode as late
explicitly conflicting data-quality, baseline, universe, unit, or safety fields
